subject: fix: bugs, UX improvements, mobile responsiveness, and error boundary
body:
Bug fixes:
- OptionsEditor: auto-slug no longer resets manually customized values
  when editing the label (compared against old label slug, not new)
- FieldValidation: min/max typed as number|string to properly support
  date validation without unsafe casts
- FieldPropertiesPanel: removed non-null assertions (field!.id), use
  stable fieldId captured before closures

UX improvements:
- Delete field requires confirmation dialog before removing
- Field duplication: new duplicate button on field cards + duplicateField
  store action (deep clones with new ID, inserts after original)
- Form title is click-to-edit in builder header
- Condition builder uses plain language: "is exactly", "is not",
  "includes", "is blank", "has a value" instead of developer jargon
- Empty responses page shows helpful guidance with icon and back link
- beforeunload warning prevents accidental tab close with unsaved changes
- React ErrorBoundary wraps entire app to prevent white-screen crashes

Mobile responsiveness:
- Builder: full-screen blocking overlay on mobile (< md) instead of
  dismissable yellow banner. Links to preview and form list.
- Response detail panel: full-screen overlay on mobile, side panel on
  desktop (fixed inset-0 z-40 + md:static md:w-80)
- SubmissionTable: card-based layout on mobile (< md), table on desktop
- EmbedCodeDialog: bottom-sheet style on mobile (items-end + rounded-t),
  centered modal on desktop (sm:items-center sm:rounded-xl)
- Form inputs: increased padding py-2 → py-2.5 for better touch targets
- Filter buttons: increased padding px-2.5 py-0.5 → px-3 py-1
- Condition builder dropdowns: px-1.5 py-0.5 → px-2 py-1
- Checkboxes: h-3.5 w-3.5 → h-4 w-4 across builder
- PageTabs add button: increased padding
- OptionsEditor reorder buttons: added padding
- Action buttons in SubmissionTable: increased padding
- index.html: viewport-fit=cover for notched phones
- index.html: apple-mobile-web-app-capable + status-bar-style meta tags

Performance:
- Memoized status filter counts in SubmissionTable (computed once per
  submissions change, not 4x per render)

Tags: bugfix, ux, mobile, a11y, performance, builder, dashboard, renderer
Complexity: 4
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: form-builder
Semver: minor
